---
title: "LRPGF07: Factors associated with gains in CELF basic concepts (F)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPGF07 is a **gain-factors** model for CELF basic concepts (`celf`): what is associated with how much children gain across the three period transitions (ANCOVA - the period post-count given its pre-count - Beta-Binomial logit, child random intercept). It conditions on the own baseline, age, cognitive ability (block design), the upstream DAG skills receptive vocabulary (R) and taught receptive vocabulary (TR), and no hearing/speech/phonological-memory confounders (CELF basic concepts has none in the revised DAG), with focal interactions group$\times$ability, group$\times$own-baseline, age$\times$ability.

_Causal labelling (DAG guardrails)._

**Only the randomised on-intervention term is causal.** Under the revised DAG (`dag/dag-language-reading.dagitty`, revised 2026-07-10) the **period-1 average marginal effect** — the genuinely randomised, all-untreated-baseline transition — is the ITT-anchor estimand; `beta_trt` itself is only the on-intervention log-odds contrast, not the ITT effect. Every other coefficient is an **adjusted association**: the child random intercept is a partial, shrunken stand-in for between-child heterogeneity and does **not** control latent general ability, so these internal slopes stay **descriptive associations** - report as "associated with", never "drives". Intervention sessions/dose are never conditioned on (a DAG collider). SES is excluded (not a DAG node; statistically redundant).

## Model

Beta-Binomial$(N, \mu\kappa, (1-\mu)\kappa)$ on the period post-count, $N = 18$, with
$\operatorname{logit}\mu = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{period}} + \beta_{\text{trt}}\text{OnIntervention} + \gamma_{\text{own}}\operatorname{logit}_*(\text{pre}) + \gamma_A A_{\text{std}} + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks}) + \sum_{s\in\{R,TR\}}\gamma_s\operatorname{logit}_*(s_{\text{pre}}) + \sum\text{interactions} + u_{\text{child}}$. Priors: shared template in `priors.py`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_results_factors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
